identity.canonical_title: Helical Transfer Function with Berry and Sagnac Phases

theory.canonical_statement: Light propagating through a rotating helical medium accumulates both a geometrical Berry phase, proportional to the golden ratio logarithm, and a Sagnac phase due to rotation.
theory.technical_interpretation: Light propagating through a rotating helical medium accumulates both a geometrical Berry phase, proportional to the golden ratio logarithm, and a Sagnac phase due to rotation.

equation_progression.interpretive_role: This fixes the helical transfer function for the rotating orbital-angular-momentum mode.
This adds the mode dispersion law that determines the transport frequency.
This closes the entry by summing the Berry and Sagnac phase sectors carried by the helical channel.
